jcr:content.cardDescription: We’re willing to make the choices that deliver a lasting impact to patients, communities and our world.
jcr:content.ctaAltText: Learn more about sustainability at AbbVie

item_0.imageAlt: two kids playing soccer out side
item_0.name: Hero Container Item
Text Container Text
item_0.text: Leading with purpose, we’re advancing a healthier world by driving transformational impact for patients, communities, our people and business.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We are committed to making a real difference in people’s lives and creating a positive impact on the world for generations to come.

teaser.description: It’s not just the breakthroughs we achieve that matter, it’s also the paths we take to achieve them.
teaser.name: Teaser
teaser.title: Making a remarkable impact

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Driving transformative change in communities worldwide so that everyone can live their healthiest life.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Supporting communities around the world in times of crisis with the donation of medicines and needed resources.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Unlocking opportunities to sustainably grow our company so we can create a positive impact for generations to come.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We are committed to delivering a lasting impact to patients, communities and our world.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: disbursed to philanthropic partners through AbbVie and the AbbVie Foundation since 2013

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: donated to disaster relief organizations excluding product donations in 2024

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: employees participated in our volunteer programs globally in 2024

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: reduction in absolute Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions compared to 2021 baseline

video.name: Video
video.overlayDescription: Celebrating the close of our historic, five-year $350 million grants to nine nonprofit partners.

block.name: Custom Title
block.title: Making a real difference for patients, communities and society

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: 2023 marked the close of our historic five-year, $350 million commitment to create long-term impact through donations to nine non-profit organizations providing equitable access to health care, addressing systemic barriers in education and building community resiliency. This commitment has touched hundreds of thousands of lives and exemplifies the responsibility and privilege of everyone at AbbVie to support our communities, better our society and serve patients.

block.name: Custom Title
block.title: Aligning our work with our Principles

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Our principles are the beliefs that we share. They shape our identity and the actions we take each day to take care of our communities and each other.

cta.aria-label: See our principles Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta
